11112.content:
During an undercover mission to Ryloth, Jedi knight Anakin Skywalker discovers a Separatist plot
to take back the planet from the Republic. In haste to relay the news to the Jedi Temple, Anakin was
captured and taken to a secret base as prisoner.

         Anakin was tied up and disarmed from his lightsaber and was being taken through a series of tunnels.
Everything was quiet until a voice broke out yelling, "Bring the Jedi to meeee!". Anakin was analyzing his
surrounding and saw no possible escape all he can do was wait. Anakin was brought to this big room
with a insect like being on a throne in the center. "Foolish Jedi, you think you can learn about our plans and
get away with it hah, I have special plans for you" Anakin was calm but yet stilled worried what will happen
to him."Gaurds take him to our dinning room, treat our guest" the insect stated. Anakin was taken to a room
with tons of food which was tempting, but his training kept him from falling into temptation. However, Anakin
was suddenly injected with a serum and Anakin was beginning to get hungry...
11112.title: mission

111121.content:
Though Anakin was a Jedi knight and had training in temperance and patience, Anakin could no longer deny his hunger. He shakenly took the fork that was placed for him he did his best trying to resist taking the food but once the fork touched a piece of meat, it was all over for him he thrust the fork into his mouth biting down on the meat and began to chew, he rapidly began to repeat this process he didn't even have time to taste it, this ravenous hunger that overcame him had him into submission. Anakin feasted for what seemed to be an hour till he stopped completely stuffed. If anything changed in the room he wouldn;t have noticed he was so caught up in his meal that he didn't even pay attention to anything that wasn't on the table, that why he was shocked to see when he looked down he saw that he had gained some weight. "Impossible" Anakin had muttered to himself, he knew that he had stuffed himself to the brim but he didn;t think that it would have lead to a considerable weight gain like this.

For now, the weight gain seems to only have affected his belly, it jutted out from his waist and pulled on his attire, he didn't even dare touch it, fearing that it would jiggle. He then remembered that he was injected with a strange serum, he guessed that his new attributed hunger and weight gain was caused by this, he wasn;t sure what to do...
111121.title: Start Feasting

1111211.content: He couldn't take it. The hunger inside of him almost pained him. even after that feast, Anakin still felt like he needed more. More food. He looked down at his growing gut, and almost moaned. Part of his consciousness said that this was inappropriate behavior for a Jedi knight, but the other told him to screw the Jedi code and order. What was wrong with just feeling pleasure eating food? Didn't the masters and the council feel content with meditation? Why couldn't he be content with stuffing himself? "Damn, what's the point of worrying about anything, its not like these people are going to let me go anywhere," Anakin said to himself. Then, he stopped. What would Obi-Wan think? His old master was always strict about many things, and if he saw Anakin like this, he might never speak to him again. "Eh, Obi-Wan and the council can piss off if they judge me for this," Anakin said smugly. So, he started to eat again. After a while, he started to feel really full. Anakin looked down at himself, and was shocked. even after all that food, he still didn't feel full, yet his stomach would make some beg to differ. It was pooling in his stomach, a nice supple ball of soft pudge resting on Anakin's lap. Underneath this, was Anakin's throbbing boner. "How could I get this fat? Or even this hot?" he said to himself. Trying something he'd never think he'd do in his life, Anakin started pinching and playing with his newfound belly. The more he did it, the harder he got. Anakin wanted more. He wanted to eat until he couldn't move. He wanted sweets and cake. Even Dexter's would do. But most of all, he wanted someone to feed it to him. A hot guy, who would actually care and appreciate Anakin for what he was. Or at least some male Jedi to get out of this horny hellhole. Although, he could live with staying here and eating.
1111211.title: Anakin Gets Hungry and Horny

11112111.content: It wasn't long till Anakin believed that staying on Ryloth was a good thing. The Jedi Order had always preached restraint and to control one's emotions and not to let them rule over one. But the serum that he had been given was too strong. His willpower was eroding away into given into his primal urges. He wanted to get fat. He wanted his body to spill out of his Jedi robes, the through made Anakin instantly hard. What were so good about Jedi teachings if they couldn't make you happy after all. Being fat made Anakin happy. He began to eat more of the strange food that was put out for him while feeling his newfound belly, he wanted to stay here, he might be a prisoner but he was being treated like a king, something that the Jedi order could never do for him. He hoped that the Jedi order would never find him here. As Anakin began to gorge himself with more food to his heart's content.

11313.content:
Anakin, his Padawan Ahsoka, his former Master Obi-wan and the squad of clone commandos behind them all stare in awe at the sight before them: a separatist droid factory they had been sent to destroy.

The factory in question was supposed to still be under construction, built on a nameless, untamed, yet mineral rich world in the Outer Rim in an uncharted system that only had a string of numbers for a name, a great hiding spot. At the moment it was supposed to only have the infrastructure up and running to build cheap, simple B1 droids (and even then only at fraction of the output it would be capable of completed) and just basic defenses up- enough to keep the local wild life and any nosey drifters at bay, but not much else.

In other words, a big juicy, lightly defended target. One that would, if left alone to be completed and expanded, would extend and possibly change the tide of the war. It’s only real defense It’s aforementioned remote location, which was kept secret until a captured separatist general, a trade prince from one of the wealthier families funding the war, gave it up in exchange for a more comfortable stay in prison and pardon at the end of the war. Hence only the small experienced strike team of two Jedi, and Delta Squad (and a Padawan still new enough that she still squeaked) to blow it up.

Of course, as fate often dictates for these people in particular, things were not to be so easy. Instead it looked like they were lied to about it’s defenses which were far, far more than deadly than what they were told... or rather they were before someone or something took a sledgehammer to the place!

Anakin whistles as he surveys the mechanical carnage: busted clankers everywhere, and not just B1s, there was also loads of supers and droidekas, enough that they would be scary... if they weren’t already among the “violently dismantled”. In fact judging by all the equally busted towers and gun emplacements, it looked like the place was a lot better defended than the good prince had said it was.

Anakin briefly wonders weather their informant lied to them or was intentionally misinformed- he was a pretty lousy general, as most princes with wealthy families looking to have some “fun” with a droid army tend to be, but shrugged it off as a moot point, unless this was a trick, it was the truth now.

“Wow... who, or what, did all this?” Ahsoka asked, flabbergasted at the destruction.

“Good question! Part of me wants to thank them for doing our job for us, the other part of me wants to yell at them robbing us of all our fun.” Delta-62, aka “Scorch”, the demolitionist of delta squad remarked, before forlornly pulling out a satchel charge. “I was looking forward to blowing this place up!”

“Cheer up Scorch, they might have left some of the assembly line intact.” Delta-38, or “Boss” the leader of delta squad says, patting Scorch on the shoulder. “After all, we’ve got to make sure this place is a complete write off.“

“Fingers crossed!”

Anakin chuckles and shakes his head as the group walks out of the forest hiding them and onto the factory grounds proper, he’s liking this group of clones already, it’s a shame they haven’t been together on any missions before.

Their journey is uneventful, aside from one not quite dead defense turret that turns on and targets them- only to spark and pop off it’s mounting with a small bang, and roll away, smoking. Anakin takes a whiff as it rolls past and crinkles his nose, smells just like that capacitor C-3PO blew when he first tried to power him up years ago as a kid- if he had to guess, whatever hit the place must have damaged the power supply and when it tried to charge it’s guns... bang!

The procession stops when they round the corner and reach the main gate, which has been smashed through... from inside the plant, and leading out from the mangled blast door is a pair of very big tracks, left by a very big set of treads.

“Well, that’s ominous.” Quips Obi-wan.

“I’m betting it was some sort of new ultimate battle droid that went nuts and started shooting everything the second it booted up.” Scorch offers.

Boss just shakes his head. “That’s too good a bet.” This gets nods from everyone.

The group follows the tread marks to where they stop, then look around. There’s there no sign of what made them... but the spot lines up with several huge holes burned straight through several of the now very defunct turbo cannon towers... and in a circle all around the spot are a staggering number of tiny craters from missed/deflected turbo cannon shots and blaster bolts...

“No sign of whatever did all this, and there’s no more tracks in the mud, so whatever it is, it can either fly, or it’s back in the plant... or both.” The young Padawan says, staring at the ruined blast door, and gulping nervously.

“All in favor of going back to the ship and glassing the place from orbit?” Scorch says, volunteering both his suggestion and hand. Asoka’s hand immediately joins his, however the other, less humor prone clones simply check their blasters grimly, and Obi-wan and Skywalker share a look, before taking a moment to focus on the force...

They both take deep calming breaths, and listen. The force is mostly calm out here... aside from a very obvious echo of the battle can be seen and felt, even by those without the gift to do so. They both let it in and see a massive tank simply plow through the blast door, slowing to a stop where they now stand... the war machine is like nothing either have seen before.

It’s huge, advanced looking with sharp angles and glowing components to be seen in the gaps of its armor plating. It moves on four tread pods with guns mounted on their tops and sides, while the front has a thickly armored prow. As for the tank’s turret it has a huge pair of what appear to be glowing plasma cannons as it’s main gun battery, while on the top of it a turret appears to be two pairs of missile batteries and a small port in the behind the hatch that starts popping out drones. Finally the rear end of the vehicle has vents on top constantly emitting heat, and a pair of boosters below them.

The echo continues with all the droids and defenses that had, up to this point, been focused on the factory entrance in anticipation of the vehicle’s exit, opening fire! However it’s no use as a large hexagonal energy shield immediately springs up around the tank, completely protecting the it and it’s minions from the withering barrage. Protection in place, the tank and the drone promptly fire back, to far more devastating effect! Their guns quickly and efficiently target and fry the droids, mowing down even the shielded droidekas! While the smaller guns handle the droids the tank’s main guns and missiles go to town on the cannons, it’s barrels letting loose an ominous whine as they glow brighter and expand, before collapsing down again and letting loose a thunderous thick blue stream of plasma with a loud THOOOOM!!! Putting the massive holes they’ve already seen in the towers here in the present. As for the missile pods, they don’t appear to be full of solid ordnance, as they appear to be guns when they open up that fire glowing orbs that home in on targets and explode!

In less than two minutes every bit of separatist tech outside is steaming scrap metal and all the local wildlife has hauled ass far, far away from the very one sided and noisy battleground. The tank then stows it’s weapons and trundles back inside the factory, swarm of drones in tow. And with that the vision of the recent past ends and as it does both Anakin and Obi-wan blatantly realize they could feel something very important flowing through the monstrous machine in the echo: the force! It didn’t seem to be aligned to one side or the other, but the sense of the force was strong with it, empowering it, not quite like anything either Jedi had felt before, save for the crystals in their lightsabers, and even then to far greater effect.

The two share a look, before reaching out with their senses into the factory and then down past it... finally both sense the tank, force still flowing through it, though it’s apparently at rest. They can also feel something else... some sort of structure deep under the factory. It feels... ancient like the Jedi temple, but far, far older.

“It’s still in there, deep underground... I think.”

“Sir?” Fixer, or Delta-40 asks.

“We can... “see” a very recent memory of what happened here...” Anakin explains, telling the clones and his Padawan the vision and as he does he can feel anxiety build in all present... even the commander, not that he lets it show.

Boss hums to himself for a moment before saying: “Look like the septs dug too deep and payed the price... Still we need to at least look and make sure this whole factory is destroyed inside... Master Jedi, you said you can feel the “tank”, and something else?

Obi-wan nods. “Yes, I’m not sure how but the force flows through it and the large structure it seems to be protecting, we should be able to sense it if starts moving and make a run for it. More than that, I’d like to get a look at whatever it’s guarding, assuming it doesn’t take offense to our presence.”

“Uhh, are you sure that‘s a good idea?” Anakin asks, more than a bit incredulous.

The Jedi master takes a deep breath and lets it out slowly. “No not really, but if we go back without poking around someone else will get sent back here to check. Besides this our job anyways.”

Without any other argument besides: “this is a dumb idea!” the group enters the facility... and several minutes later find themselves cornered by the tank, and it’s friends. Said friends:
11313.title: Tank troubles.

choices: The medical machines mix up limb regeneration with genital enhancement.
Anakin’s new nanites think his junk is too small, and fix his “defect”
Nothing goes wrong, until the captain of the bunker is woken from cryosleep.
113133.content:
If anything the inside of the factory was worse than the outside. The entire line was a twisted, mangled mess of twisted mangled rails and droid parts, with numerous “skylights” installed by the tank’s main gun where sentry guns probably had been, and in many places the lights themselves where either dead or flickering weakly... and in more than one place support beams had been knocked out.

“Welp, you don’t need me to knock this place down, a good sneeze ought to do it.” Scorch says as he looks the damage over with his demolitionist’s eye.

“A sneeze huh?” Sev, or Delta-07, the last, but no less bloodthirsty member of Delta Squad in red armor deadpans.

“... Alright, fine a krayt dragon sneeze. But uh... joking aside this place is seriously condemned, stay the hell away from those busted supports.” As if to punctuate the yellow highlighted clone’s point, a large piece of the ceiling falls off and hits the floor with a loud smack! “See what I mean?”

“Well that’s good enough for me... unless you still wish get a look at the tank and whatever it’s guarding, General Kenobi.” Boss says, praying that the famous Jedi has changed his mind.

“Oh believe me, I don’t want to, but it’s either lie to the council about whatever it’s guarding, or go back and tell them and either get sent back to take a look, or have someone else get sent to take a look instead... somebody perhaps less lucky than we all are.”

“Ah so they’ve told you about our misadventures general!” Scorch replies cheerfully.

“Stow it Delta 62.” Boss immediately snapped.

“Oh it’s fine commander. After all, we’ve all lived though our fair share of our own misadventures, haven’t we, Anakin?”

“Oh you mean the ones Skyguy here caused?”

“Very funny Snips...” Anakin mutters to his Padawan.

“Well I wasn’t going to go that far but now that you mention-“ Obi-wan however finds himself cut short as a loud rumble echos through the factory and all three Jedi feel a surge in the force far in front of them.

“Run!” All over three Jedi say as they turn tail, followed instantly by the commandos... of course they don’t get far before a noise comparable to a jet engine roars behind them, and moments later a large object sails overhead on wings of flame. It crashes down hard, but no worse for wear as it skids, sending sparks flying as it turns a full 180 degree turn to face them. It is, of course the tank, and in no time at all each force sensitive and clone has a gun pointed at them, glowing and humming ominously.

“Oh good, it flies.”

“Discard your weapons and put your hands up, or be annihilated.” Issues forth an obviously mechanical, and quite frankly terrifying voice from the tank.

Anakin briefly considers drawing his lightsaber and igniting it... but thinks better of it and drops it in front of him, along side everyone else’s weapons as he puts his hands up... “Okay, between Me, Obi-wan and Ahsoka, we can use the force to rearm in heartbeat...” he thinks to himself.

At this point the tank’s drones show up, and pop out little grabbers, and waste no time whisking their gear away.

“Provided exactly that doesn’t happen...”

“Okay... we’re unarmed, I don’t suppose you could power your weapons down and let us go?”

“Negative, this unit will not release you here, you will be escorted to the edge of this accursed separatist facility, then you will be released and your equipment returned via drone... it is suggested you do not attempt to return...”

“Accursed? For the record we don’t like them either, we were here to demolish this factory actually.”

For a moment the tank stares at them through the optics on its guns... then dims it’s weapons and asks: “Are you with the republic then... are you... Jedi?”

“Well, yes.”

“Oh thank god!” Not only has the voice raised a few octaves and levels in friendliness, the tank’s weapons power down. “It’s true right? You can move things with your minds, right? Even with glass or something in the way?”

“Yes?”

The tank visibly sags in relief. “Oh hallelujah, the facility is saved! These damn droids found me several weeks ago, and up until I pulverized them yesterday they’ve been trying nonstop to get into my bunker. I was content to simple watch them try and fail to get past the main blast door, it was kinda funny even, the thin ones are pretty stupid!“

“We know... so what’s the problem, and can we have our gear back?”

“Oh! Right, drones give the nice people their toys back! Anyways as I was saying the droids have been trying to get in, they eventually started digging. That wouldn’t be a problem, but... I’ve been here awhile, like tens of thousands of years awhile... I spent most of the time asleep, but I digress, over that time water got in places, like my reactor chamber. The stalagmites looks cool so I let them be... They didn’t hurt anything, until the droids whole them lose that is. Now one is stuck in a reactor feed, and it will explode if it’s not fixed.

The Jedi look at each other.

“A stuck rock doesn’t sound like much of a problem...” Anakin mutters.

“I’d agree with you, if the reactor fail safes weren’t stupid. Because it’s slowly going critical it’s in an emergency state, and I don’t actually have the clearance anymore to get something in there and knock the rock out.

“So how long until you blow?”

“Oh, awhile, it’ll take about a week, but without that feed stabilizer active it will go eventually.”

“Still, no time like the present, lead the way, um...”

“Hypnos, and thank you! Hop aboard, I promise I’ll make it worth your while!”

With that the whole group shares a look.

“Well after seeing what this tank did to those clankers...” Sev says with a darkly amused chuckle.

“Hmm, you’ll have to talk to my captain about that, but I can promise you as soon as you fix my reactor I can get you into medical for a nice nanite infusion! They’re hot stuff, Architect nanites will keep you young and strong as long as you keep yourself feed and watered, and then some! You’ll even be able to modify your own bodies once you full integrate with them!”

“Uh... are there any side effects?” Ahsoka asks as they all find a place on the tank and hold on.

“Side effects? What, you mean besides being immune to all but the nastiest diseases and old age? I mean come on, who wants to die old and decrepit, or at all? There shouldn’t be any side effects beyond that they are Omni-species-comparable!”

“Immortality huh...” Obi-wan mulls it over, a double edged sword to be sure... but, the republic could use powerful friends like Hypnos and his people. Sure the republic was winning, but ending the war sooner would spare lives and suffering. So it’d be best not to turn him down. “I hope no one here was planning on dying of old age.” He mutters.

Before long they reach the end of the destroyed factory and the beginning of the bunker the droids were excavating. It’s general aesthetics are similar to the tank they are riding, but they don’t get a chance to dwell on it as the blast door opens and the tank shoots on through and comes to a stop at the other end of a large garage full of vehicles. Hypnos shoos them along with his drones and leads them deeper into the bunker until they reach the ailing reactor. Once more, all jaws drop, as apparently reactor In... whatever Hypnos’ people are, means tiny artificial star!

The star itself is oddly dim, enough to be looked directly at, and the chamber around it has several devices inside that alternates between shooting stuff into it, and extracting stuff out of it, except one in a corner which has a big piece of rock wedging it’s shutter shut. On its hemisphere the mini star it seems... sick, with a number of sun spots and constant solar flares.

Getting said rock out is no problem, all of them can see it through the glass and it’s loose, just not in a position for the device to rattle it out. It’s something any of the Jedi and trainee present could do alone but as a show of solidarity Skywalker, Tanoo and Kenobi all reach out and grasp the rock with the force and yank it out of the shutter. The device opens and closes several times before emitting a beam into the star that lasts until the sickly section is healed.

“Phew! I really can’t thank you enough, uh, just go ahead and drop the rock into the star, it’ll eat it no problem, and I can extract the extra material to make your nanites and some other goodies for you.”

The three nod and watch as it disappears in a gout of fire.

“Now for your rewards, Mister Skywalker, I’d like to start with you, replace your prosthetic arm.”

“What’s wrong with it?” Anakin asks a bit taken back.

“Nothing... it’s just the nanites I’m gonna give you won’t like it. They’ll eat it and regrow your proper arm the slow achey way, my way’s a lot faster and pain free.”

“Oh, Guess I’ll be back. Watch Snips for me Obi.” Anakin says to his companions as he runs down the hallway.

“Really, Skyguy?” Ahsoka calls back to him, but he’s already gone, Hypnos showing him the way via holograms and he’s soon seated in a surprisingly comfy medical chair... totally unaware of the turn his day is about to take...
113133.title: Reactors and rewards.

choices: He learns his cum can make other men grow enormous packages
The rest of his body suddenly starts growing to match his package.
The Seperstists turn his cum into a gas and use it as a weapon against the Jedi.
1132.content:
As Anakin snuck through the new Separatist battleship, he knew something was up. These “special weapons” projects always were no good. As he thought this though, a dart flew out a hidden corner and struck his neck. He promptly collapsed.

As he woke up, he dimly realized he was strappe to a table in a lying flat position. A disembodied mechanical voice droned, “SUBJECT AWAKE. BEGIN TESTING.” As Anakin wondered what sort of horrible test they meant, another dart hit is shoulder. Immediately bracing himself for that woozy feeling, he was surprised to feel none. Strangely, he felt an odd tingling in his groin. He felt strangely aroused. Then it hit him like a bomb went off. His package suddenly swelled. His dick shot out 7 inches. His balls swelled to the size of tangerines. As he lay there feeling very turned on, he exploded out again, and a lot more. His package completely destroyed the groin of his tunic, so that it lay in the open now. His balls were now the size of apples. His manhood exploded out yet again, and this time it didn’t stop. As it continued to swell, his dick got thicker so it stayed reasonably proportional (at least with his balls). His balls passed the size of melons. As his member continued to swell, he arched his back as much as he could, loving the feeling. His balls had passed the size of soccer balls. And it begin to slow. As his growth ground to a halt, Anakin lifted his head just enough to see his glorious manhood. It was too much. He roared and shot the hugest load anyone had ever seen. If he had not been strapped to a table; he would have been propelled over by the force. He erupted like a volcano for several minutes. As he finally finished releasing, the table tilted upward, and released him. He thankfully did not find it difficult to support his enormous package. As he stood there, he decided that maybe these “special weapons” projects might not be no good after all.

1211212.content: Obi-Wan woke with a start. All he remembered was checking a report on strange activity on a remote, supposedly abandoned research station. Apparently it was not as abandoned as he thought. As he focused on his surroundings, he realized he was suspended above the ground by some force. As he pondered this (and of course how he was going to get out of it), evil laughter reached his ears. It sent shivers down his spine. “Welcome to my research station, young Kenobi.” “What do you want with me?” he called back in a steady voice. Again, the chilling laughter. “Let us just say one of the more ‘interesting’ aspects of the force has a side efffect which I have never realized, which I would like to test. “You are young and strong, a perfect candidate.” Wondering what on Coruscant he could mean, Obi-Wan was unprepared for the bolt of bluish lightning that shot out of a dark area at him. He roared as it struck him. He had heard of Siths using this “force lightning,” though he had never seen it. He suddenly felt every muscle in his lean body clench violently. This forced another growl out of him. He then oddly felt them all loosen, them clench again. He realized, with shock, that they were growing before his very eyes. They would clench, then loosen and expand slightly. He began to feel less pain, and more power. As he became lost in this blissful agony, he fell to the ground on his hands and knees. He continued to expand as his tunic tore, leaving his powerful growing body exposed. He then suddenly felt the lightning stop coming. After recovering on the floor for a moment, he stood, sweat glistening on his large, meaty pecs and his powerful shoulder and arms.

142.content:
The small X-wing fighter flew past the last moon of Dagobah as entered into its atmosphere. A small light began to flash, indicating that the landing site was within the glide slope of the incoming aircraft, and that the pilot and co-pilot had to trim the airspeed in order to ensure a smooth landing.

“Alright! Reduce speed by thirty percent, Jake! Don’t make us come in too fast, or else we’ll end up landing in the middle of a swamp!” Luke ordered to his co-pilot, who happened to be his nephew and his apprentice.

“Gotcha, Uncle Luke!” the teenager replied, as he adjusted the controls. “Reduce speed by thirty percent, Artoo!” Jake Skywalker ordered his R2D2 unit, who was positioned behind him in the X-wing fighter.

The engines lowered their output as the small jet came in and prepared for landing.

“Ready for a great week of camping and training, champ?” Luke Skywalker asked the boy. Luke was now the Jedi Master, and he had taken the young boy under his wing so that he could teach him the ways of the Force by starting out on the planet where he had first met the great Jedi Master, Yoda, many years earlier.

“Yes, I can’t wait to get started, Uncle Luke!” Jake replied. Jake was fifteen years old; he was short with short, black hair.

The X-wing swooped down, scoped out the familiar landing site, and set down on the grassy field right near the edge of the swamp. Once the plane had landed, Luke and Jake allowed their canopies to raise up, so they could climb out and explore the planet’s surface.

“Wow! We’re here!” Jake smiled, as he removed his helmet and looked around.

Luke walked ahead of him, and headed towards a cavern, where he saw a faint, blue glow.

“Normally, I would set up a fire in here, but I just noticed this weird, blue light. I had never noticed that before. I wonder what it is.” Luke noted, as he entered the cavern and started walking towards the light.

“Is it dangerous?” Jason asked him.

“I’m not sure… I can’t remember this light being here last time I was here, which was a few years ago!” Luke responded.

When Luke walked a little further, he spotted a large rock, which was about five feet tall, which had a bright, blue sphere sitting on top of it. The sphere was glowing bright blue, and it was even humming!

“That sphere… It… It is powered by… The Force!” Luke noted. “I… I can feel it!”

“Really? Are you sure?” Jake wondered out loud.

“The Force is very strong in that sphere! It’s everywhere around us! It’s already surrounding our bodies!” Luke observed.

“Uncle Luke… Is… Is that good, or bad? Is it doing anything to us?” Jake wondered. “I’m beginning to feel warm all over…”

“I’m not sure what or how this will affect us… Come, let’s go back to the ship…” Luke remarked.

Luke and Jake then turned around and walked out of the cavern. They would set up camp, and prepare something to eat.

That night, they would already begin to notice some differences to their bodies…
142.title: Muscle inflation

choices: Jake makes his own muscles grow using the Force
1421.content:
Luke had set up a large inflatable tent next to the X-Wing fighter, which was big enough for bot him and Jake to sleep in. The Dagobah nights were hot and humid, so they would only sleep with cotton shirts, shorts, and sandals on. The planet was like a big, tropical rain forest, and since they were located near a swamp and right by a lake, drinking water was no problem, either.

That night, Luke had dozed off almost immediately, since he had to be awake to navigate the X-wing fighter, but Jake was able to sleep during the flight from the rebel base, so the teenage boy really wasn't all that tired. In fact, he lay awake, thinking about that weird, blue sphere that they had seen in the cavern.

Jake realized that his Uncle Luke wanted to be cautious, but still, he almost felt like he was drawn towards it. It almost appeared as if he was called to go near it. If the sphere was so strong in the Force, then why did he have to stay away from it? Maybe his Uncle was being too cautious! Jake slowly got up from his sleeping bag and walked out of his tent.

The young Jedi apprentice then took a small flashlight and walked towards the small cavern, which was only a few yards away from where they were. Again, as he approached the cavern, he spotted the strange, bright blue light coming from the cavern. The light just seemed too welcoming to him. He wanted to see what it was.

As Jake stepped into the cavern, he saw the bright light coming from the spehere, which rested on the pedestal. He no longer needed the flashlight, and turned it off. As he got closer, the light grew more intense! Then, when Jake was almost six feet away from it, a bright, blue flash of light suddenly emitted from the blue sphere, and struck Jake in the chest!

Jake just felt overwhelmed! He was overcome by an enormous surge of power! It was as if an enormous blast of The Force was being pumped into his body! In fact, his body was almost being levitated off the ground, as the beam from the sphere continued to charge the boy's body with the mysterious power. Jake didn't feel any pain or anything, but he could feel that his body was changing!

Suddenly, the beam of light weakened and the blue sphere had lost its glow completely. There was no beam of light, and the sphere was completely died out. Jake's body dropped to the ground, and the boy was unconscious. After a few minutes had passed, he woke up, in a daze, and he stumbled back to the tent. He felt tired and sweaty, but he also noticed that he seemed a little more muscular than before. His arms were thicker. His biceps were bigger. His quads and calves had inflated some. His chest had puffed out some. But, weirdest of all, he felt this strange, amazing power coarsing within him. Was that the Force?

Little did he know that he was endowed with the measure of the Force that was comparable to that of a Jedi Master... And he was only fifteen years old!
1421.title: Jake becomes a little more muscular than before

choices: Jake makes Luke's muscles even bigger at Sandooine
Jake grows some of the other Jedi trainees' muscles
14212.content:
Jake ran back to his tent and crawled under the sleeping back after his strange encounter in the cavern. Strangely enough, he felt stronger… faster… more powerful. Still, he ignored the feelings and drifted off into a deep sleep.

When Luke woke up a few hours later, he got dressed and started gathering some wood for a fire. When Jake heard that Luke was already up, he put on his robe and his boots, and came out of his tent. As he looked around, he saw that Luke had started a pile of firewood.

“Good morning!” Luke shouted, since he spotted Jake from a distance. “See if you can get a fire going! I’ll get some more firewood, Jake!”

Jake walked over to the stack of branches, which were tossed over a small fire-pit, dug in the ground. This was near the tent, overlooking the lake and the x-wing landing site. The teen boy knew that he had to take two sticks and rub them together in order to produce so much heat, that he would eventually start a fire. But… would there be another way to do it?

Jake felt strange… He felt different. There was something inside of him that told him that there was a better way to start a fire… Using the Force!

He walked over to the pile of branches and he raised up his right hand. He pointed his index finger at the fire-pit, and took a deep breath, thinking of nothing else but a nice, hot fire burning before him.

A bright, blue spark suddenly shot from the tip of his finger, like a bolt of lightning, and struck the branches on the ground… Instantly setting all of them on fire! In fact, the flame which ignited was huge!

“Whoa!” Jake gasped. “Did… Did I do that?” he wondered in disbelief.

Luke had just made it back to the campsite, when he spotted the large, burning flame.

“Wow! You got a fire going already?” He asked Jake. “You’re fast!”

Luke then took a small pan and heated up some beans and soup, while holding the pan under the flame. He made something to eat for himself and for Jake, and the two young men enjoyed a quick, small breakfast together, while sitting on two large tree stumps.

Once they were done, Luke lead Jake to a grassy area near the lake, where they were surrounded by several boulders and rocks, neatly placed in front of the x-wing fighter.

“Now, let’s practice the art of levitation!” Luke instructed. “Use the Force to raise these rocks!”

Luke used the Force to raise a few rocks off the ground, and to make them hover in mid-air, before setting them back down again.

“Think you can do that?”

“Umm… Let me try!” Jake smiled.

Jake looked around him and focused on everything in sight, using the Force to make every item in view to levitate a few feet off the ground. Suddenly, about a dozen rocks and boulders, including three very large boulders, began to levitate above the ground! Next, the tents began to hover in mid-air as well! Jake just grinned as he was able to make so many things hover in mid-air all at once!

Jake then turned towards Luke, who was completely slack-jawed, and made him levitate as well!

“Hey! Whooaaa! JAKE!” Luke shouted, as his boots left the ground.

Finally, Jake turned to the x-wing fighter plane, and concentrated on that, even while he was still maintaining his mental grip on all the other objects at the same time. The space-plane suddenly began to lift off above the ground, but without its engines running! The fighter then climbed higher and higher, as Jake willed it to swing around in a full one-hundred-and-eighty degree turn, so that the nose of the space craft was pointing to the other direction. Then, Jake decided to make the x-wing fighter slowly descend back to the ground, until the landing gear touched down on the grass. Lastly, Jake set down all the boulders, the tents, and he allowed Luke to land back on his feet before him!

“That… That was just amazing!” Luke stuttered, as he walked up to Jake. “You… The Force is very, very strong with you! How… How did you do that?”

Jake just shrugged.

“I just use the Force and it happens!”

“Yes, but… Nobody is THAT strong!” Luke wondered.

“I can use the Force to do many things. I can feel it. I think… I think I can even change things… I can even change people! I can change YOU!” Jake realized, as the extent of his powers became clearer to him.

“What are you talking about?” Luke asked him. “Are you that strong in the Force?”

“Sure! Look… Let me try something, Uncle Luke!” Jake smiled, as he stared at his favorite Jedi-uncle.

Suddenly, Luke felt a tingling sensation in his arms, specifically in his biceps. His muscles quickly began to harden as they slowly started to inflate with raw muscle! Luke couldn’t help but flex his arms as some unknown, invisible force seemed to be pumping more muscle into his biceps! He moaned with pleasure as he felt an amazing surge of physical strength coursing through his arms! It was as if he had just enjoyed many hours’ worth of grueling workouts in the gym! His biceps kept on growing bigger and bigger, until they were almost as large and as round as bowling balls!

“My arms! My muscles! What… How did you do that?” Luke gasped, as he flexed his huge biceps, much to Jake’s amusement.

“I did that, Uncle Luke! I can manipulate your muscles by way of the Force! Isn’t that awesome?” Jake replied with a grin. “It’s so easy!”

“Wow… I have to take you back to the Jedi Training Academy on Sandooine… You’re just like a Jedi Master! What happened to you? What did you do?” Luke asked his nephew.

“Well… I… Uhh…” was the boy’s answer.

“Did you go back to that cavern where that blue sphere was being kept?” Luke asked him.

“Yeah… I woke up last night… I went into the cavern and I got zapped by that blue sphere! I don’t know what it did to me!” Jake explained. “Why? Am I in trouble? Did I do something wrong?”

“Obviously, the sphere has passed on all of its powers to you! We’ll go get it and place it in a bag, and we’ll take it back to the academy so they can analyze it…” Luke suggested.

Luke and Jake then broke up their camp and they retrieved the sphere from the cavern. The sphere had lost all of its power, and it was like a dark rock. The two Jedi Knights then climbed on board of the x-wing fighter and took off, to Sandooine, where Jake was to be reunited with all his other Jedi trainees. The only difference was that this time, Jake was already a Jedi Master. He was looking forward to using his new powers to making some of his friends’ muscles grow, including those of Uncle Luke, who could always use some more muscle on his body!
14212.title: Jake makes Luke's muscles grow

1422.content:
After returning from the cave, both Luke and Jake were exhausted. They set up their tents and Luke immediately started to sleep. Jake was feeling exhausted but decided to stay awake What he didn’t know was what was happening to his uncle as the effects of the sphere of Force started to spread in Luke body and to mutate it. His body started to pump: his biceps started to grow, his suit’s sleeves started to rip apart has his mighty arms were pumping to Olympian athlete’s size. His torso started to become larger and larger as his pecs were pushing farther and farther, the zipper of his suit started to open, showing his incredible growing muscles. His abs also started to grow changing into an impossible twelve pack. As the growth occurs, Luke’s body was reacting by creating pleasure’s hormones. The Jedi master’s legs started to fill his pants. Also some other changes took place: His eyes’ became totally blue and started to glow. Between his legs, his package became bigger making appear a bump on his pants.

He then flexed like a bodybuilder and destroyed his clothes. 15111.content:
As Jabba’s cronies led Han towards the chamber, he could guess what was going to happen. He was going to be frozen in carbonate again. As they threw him in however, he just had to yell out, “Want me as another wall ornament Jabba!? Because I’m not coming quietly!” The low voice of the Hutt drifted over (translated of course). “Han, Han, do you really think I am going to try that again? No, I need another servant. One to do the dirty work. And soon, you will fit the type well.” Han had no idea what Jabba meant. He wasn’t working for Jabba in a million years, and he may be fit, but he was by no means musclebound.

As he thought about this, a gas filled the chamber he had been thrown into. He still flinched, but it wasn’t cold. It seemed to strangely grab at him. It suddenly seemed to seize him and hold him immobile as he gave a shout of surprise. But suddenly, he got an odd feeling. “I have a bad feeling about this,” he muttered. It felt like he was filling his clothes out very tightly. Suddenly, the feeling increased tenfold. He suddenly exploded out of his shirt. He couldn’t help giving a gasp or noticing his voice was lower. He had quickly developed very powerful muscles. They continued to grow, and he began to feel aroused. His legs followed suit, bursting through his pants, leaving him in a small pair of undergarments. He moaned as he felt his body harden everywhere. He was quickly becoming a beast.
